MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Wartelle (415-693-0504) of Wartelle Weaver & Schreiber for Frances Pinnock, plaintiff and moving party / Thoms O'Brien (415-956-9200) of Walston Cross, P.C., for Linda Wong, defendant and opposing party

Hearing - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: Court finds 1) Opposing party has not met the standard as to 473.b and 2) Court believes proposed Amended Complaint is a sham. CROSS DEFENDANT FRANCES PINNOCK's MOTION TO STRIKE as to First Amended Complaint is granted. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is moot. Opposing party's request to file Second Amended Complaint is denied. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, CSR: Angie Diner 851 (415-748-4030) (D501)

HEARING - Court tentatively rules as follows: Cross-defendant's Motion to Strike Portions of Cross-Complaint as to slander and IIED causes of action, granted without leave to amend. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard cross-defendant's oral argument adopts its tentative ruling as stated. Moving party to prepare order in conformity with CRC 3.1312. Off Calendar May-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Wartelle, Esq., of Wartelle Weaver & Schreiber, Tel. 415.693.0504, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

No other appearance on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LINDA WONG and REGGIE WONG'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is Denied.
